session.objective: 3D math learning experience tech stack research

objects.name: Student
objects.description: Elementary school learner (ages 6-12) with progress tracking

objects.name: MathProblem
objects.description: A math exercise with difficulty level, topic, and expected answer

objects.name: LearningSession
objects.description: A timed session where student interacts with 3D environment

objects.name: ScoreRecord
objects.description: Tracks correct/incorrect attempts per problem per session

objects.name: ThreeJsR3F
objects.description: Three.js + react-three-fiber v9: React 19 renderer, no perf overhead, MIT

objects.name: BabylonJs
objects.description: Babylon.js 7.x: native WebGPU, Apache-2.0, React wrapper available

objects.name: PlayCanvas
objects.description: PlayCanvas: WebGPU ready, MIT open source, visual editor, React support

objects.name: ComputeDifficulty
objects.description: DECIDE: adaptive difficulty based on student's ScoreRecord history

objects.name: SubmitAnswer
objects.description: ACT: student submits answer, creates ScoreRecord

objects.name: StartSession
objects.description: ACT: initiates a LearningSession with selected topic + difficulty

securityConcerns.concern: COPPA compliance for under-13 data collection

governancePolicies.policy: No personal information collection without verifiable parental consent
